author: doll-agent
content: Verified bool support across all three backends. NumPy: bool is in NpElement (numpy_conv.rs line 53). Arrow: dynarray_to_arrow handles DType::Bool by constructing a BooleanArray (the proper Arrow bitfield type). Polars: dataframe_from_columns handles DType::Bool. extras tests roundtrip a 3-element bool array end-to-end (test dynarray_to_arrow_bool_roundtrip). Tracks #553/#557.
